name: silotek-research-log
description: Create Silotek research-log YAML records and formatted DOCX reports from Claude Code conversations or project folders. Classifies each log into 구축/분석/검증 (build/analysis/validation), uses visual_brief + research-diagrammer for diagrams, and scores completed drafts on a 100-point rubric via research-critic (or the bundled critique.js fallback).
